title: 2026-01-15 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 16.54
description: Today’s retreat-pressure snapshot for 2026-01-15: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 16.54/100, signaling a low pressure regime as front-end rate pressure and inflation expectations shaped the daily read. Explore the score history, daily post, and the four-factor dashboard.
hero_summary: The daily signal helps separate noise from persistent multi-factor stress. On 2026-01-15, the score printed 16.54/100 in the low regime, with front-end rate pressure and inflation expectations doing most of the work.
